name: MSI PRO B760M-P DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-4800+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - HDMI 1.4 - DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - Realtek Gigabit LAN (B760MPD4)
shortName: MSI PRO B760M-P DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR4, PCIe 4.0, and legacy VGA support for budget builds.
